prompt: I have this React component in src/components/Dashboard.tsx that fetches data, transforms it, and renders a chart all in one 180-line function. The data fetching uses useEffect with a manual fetch call. Should I break this up? If so, how?
assertions: Recommends extraction of data fetching from rendering concern
Does NOT blindly recommend extracting everything -- applies judgment about when extraction adds unnecessary layers
Any new files or functions use named exports
